cards.p: Willie Mays World Series MVP Award

sections.odds: 500 cards, including 100 short prints. Buy base sets on eBay. · PARALLEL CARDS: Red Border (3 per Target Giant Box), Black Border (50 copies), Flip Stock (5 copies). · FRENCH VARIATION: Cards #1-400.
